faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about eSIMs, purchasing, installation, usage, and your MobiaL account.
faq.generalA1: An eSIM (embedded SIM) is a digital SIM that allows you to activate a cellular plan without using a physical SIM card. It's built into most modern smartphones and can be activated by scanning a QR code or entering an activation code.
faq.generalA2: MobiaL is an eSIM marketplace that partners with multiple providers to offer you the best data plans for your destination. Simply choose your country or region, select a plan, complete your purchase, and receive a QR code instantly via email. Scan it with your phone and you're connected.
faq.generalA3: We offer eSIM plans for over 190 countries and territories worldwide, including popular destinations across Europe, Asia, the Americas, Africa, and the Middle East. You can search for specific countries on our products page.
faq.generalA4: Most eSIMs activate within seconds of scanning the QR code. Some plans activate immediately upon installation, while others activate when you first connect to a network in your destination country. The entire process typically takes under 2 minutes.
faq.purchasingQ1: How do I buy an eSIM?
faq.purchasingA1: Browse our plans by searching for your destination country or region. Select a plan that fits your needs, add it to your cart, and complete checkout with your preferred payment method. You'll receive your eSIM QR code instantly via email.
faq.purchasingQ2: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.purchasingA2: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) processed securely through Stripe. Additional payment methods may be available depending on your region.
faq.purchasingQ3: Can I buy an eSIM for someone else?
faq.purchasingA3: Yes. After purchasing, simply forward the QR code email to the person who will use the eSIM. They can scan it on their own compatible device. Make sure their device supports eSIM before purchasing.
faq.purchasingA4: We offer refunds for eSIMs that have not been installed or activated. Once an eSIM has been downloaded to a device, it cannot be refunded as the digital product has been consumed. Please review our refund policy for full details.
faq.installationA1: Most smartphones manufactured after 2018 support eSIM, including iPhone XS and later, Samsung Galaxy S20 and later, Google Pixel 3a and later, and many other brands. Your device must also be carrier-unlocked. Check our compatible devices page for a full list.
faq.installationQ2: Can I install the eSIM before my trip?
faq.installationA2: Yes, and we recommend it. You can install the eSIM anytime after purchase while you have an internet connection. Some eSIMs activate immediately, while others only start counting data once you connect to a network in the destination country.
faq.installationQ3: What if the QR code doesn't work?
faq.installationA3: First, make sure you have a stable internet connection. Try adjusting the screen brightness or zoom level of the QR code. If scanning still fails, use the manual installation method with the SM-DP+ address and activation code from your email. Contact our support team if issues persist.
faq.installationA4: Most modern devices can store multiple eSIM profiles, though typically only one can be active at a time alongside your physical SIM. iPhones (XS and later) support multiple eSIM profiles, and newer models like iPhone 14 (US) support dual eSIM without a physical SIM slot.
faq.usageQ1: How do I check my data usage?
faq.usageA1: You can check your data usage in your phone's Settings under Cellular/Mobile Data for the eSIM line. Some plans also provide a usage dashboard accessible through the link in your order confirmation email.
faq.usageQ2: Can I top up my eSIM?
faq.usageA2: Top-up availability depends on the specific plan and provider. Some plans support data top-ups, which you can purchase through our platform. If your plan doesn't support top-ups, you can purchase a new eSIM for additional data.
faq.usageQ3: What happens when my data runs out?
faq.usageA3: When your data allocation is fully used, your internet connection will stop. You won't be charged any overage fees. You can purchase a new eSIM or a top-up (if available) to continue using data.
faq.usageQ4: Does the eSIM support calls and SMS?
faq.usageA4: Most of our eSIM plans are data-only. This means they provide mobile data but not traditional voice calls or SMS. However, you can use apps like WhatsApp, FaceTime, and Zoom for calls over data. Some regional plans do include voice and SMS -- check the plan details before purchasing.
faq.accountQ1: How do I reset my password?
faq.accountA1: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page and enter your email address. You'll receive a password reset link within a few minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it in your inbox.
faq.accountQ2: Can I use MobiaL without an account?
faq.accountA2: You can browse plans without an account, but you'll need to create one to complete a purchase. Your account lets you track orders, access QR codes, and manage your eSIM purchases.
faq.accountQ3: How do I delete my account?
faq.accountA3: You can request account deletion by contacting our support team at support@mobialo.eu. We'll process your request in accordance with GDPR requirements. Note that order history may be retained for legal compliance purposes.
faq.heroSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about eSIMs, purchasing, installation, and more.
faq.supportDesc: Our support team is available to help you with anything.

about.title: About
about.heroDesc: We believe staying connected while traveling should be simple, affordable, and instant. No more hunting for local SIM cards or paying outrageous roaming fees.
about.whatWeDoDesc: MobiaL is a premium eSIM marketplace powered by MobiMatter, offering instant digital connectivity for travelers in over 190 countries. We aggregate plans from multiple top-tier providers so you always get the best coverage and pricing for your destination.
about.valueBestPricesDesc: We compare plans across multiple providers to bring you the most competitive prices for every destination.
about.valueInstantDeliveryDesc: Receive your eSIM QR code in seconds after payment. No waiting, no shipping, no delays.
about.valueGlobalCoverageDesc: Access data plans for 190+ countries and territories. From major cities to remote destinations.
about.value247SupportDesc: Our dedicated support team is available around the clock to help with any issues or questions.
about.stepChooseDesc: Search for your destination and pick the data plan that fits your travel needs and budget.
about.stepPayDesc: Complete your purchase with our secure Stripe-powered checkout. All major cards accepted.
about.stepConnectDesc: Receive your QR code instantly, scan it with your phone, and enjoy high-speed data on arrival.
about.ctaDesc: Browse our plans and get your eSIM in under 2 minutes.

compatibleDevices.subtitle: Check if your device supports eSIM. We list {count}+ devices across all major brands.
compatibleDevices.importantNoteText: Most phones manufactured after 2020 support eSIM. Your device must be carrier-unlocked to use an eSIM from MobiaL. Carrier-locked phones may restrict eSIM usage even if the hardware supports it. Contact your carrier if you're unsure.
compatibleDevices.notListedText: If your device isn't listed, it may still support eSIM.
compatibleDevices.dontSeeDevice: Don't see your device? Most modern smartphones support eSIM. Check your device settings or contact us.
